issues.description: Missing condition: 'If you have 2 or less Life cards' must be a condition before the thenActions. Current DSL lacks the life count condition that gates the play effect.
Action type should be 'ForceDiscard' (legacy alias for TrashCard), not 'TrashFromHand'. The latter is non-standard; verified legacy alias is TrashCard=ForceDiscard.
Filter uses 'subType' but card text says 'type including Whitebeard Pirates'. Should verify if this is a type or subType field in official schema; recommend 'type' for consistency with text.
